news.headline: Apollo Silver Corp. gives corporate update with stock symbols APGO (TSX.V), APGOF (OTCQB), 6ZF0 (Frankfurt) on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, a company known as Apollo Silver Corp. (TSX.V: APGO, OTCQB: APGOF, Frankfurt: 6ZF0) recently shared a corporate update and future prospects on December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Descartes study finds 48% of supply chain leaders worry about tariffs and trade barriers, with supply chain disruptions and geopolitical instability close behind.
news.summary: Atlanta and London, December 2, 2024 - Descartes Systems Group (Nasdaq: DSGX) (TSX: DSG) has published the key findings from its 2024 Supply Chain Intelligence Report, addressing the pressing challenges encountered by global supply chain leaders. The survey revealed that 48% of participants highlighted escalating tariffs and trade barriers as their primary worry, with supply chain disruptions following closely at 45%, and geopolitical instability at 41%. Notably, regardless of company size, the concern around tariffs and trade barriers prevailed, as respondents from companies with less than 250 employees, 251-500, 501-1,000, 1,001-50,000, and 50,000+ employees all expressed it as the most critical issue they are currently grappling with.

news.headline: Envision Energy partners with Kazakhstan to manufacture wind turbines and energy storage, boosting green energy transition.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 2, 2024, in Astana, Kazakhstan, Envision Energy, a prominent worldwide sustainable technology firm, is advancing Kazakhstan's shift to green energy by finalizing a significant deal. The agreement involves partnering with Samruk Energy and Kazakhstan Utility Systems, focusing on boosting the country's green energy transition.

news.headline: MARA Holdings plans $700M private offering for Zero-Coupon Convertible Senior Notes.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in over a decade. With a total workforce of 160 million people, this decrease translates to approximately 7.2 million individuals finding employment. The positive trend is also evident in the growth of new job opportunities across various sectors, contributing to a steady decrease in the national unemployment rate. Additionally, the youth unemployment rate has seen a significant decline by 3.5%, reaching 9.8%, showcasing improved prospects for the younger generation in the job market. These statistics indicate a promising outlook for the labor market and signal a potential boost to the overall economy.

news.headline: Mallinckrodt sells Therakos business, reducing net debt by over 60% with net proceeds. Company announced the sale on December 2, 2024.
news.summary: Mallinckrodt plc, a worldwide specialty pharmaceutical company, disclosed today the finalization of the sale of its Therakos business. The transaction resulted in net proceeds that will significantly decrease the Company's net debt by over 60%.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk initiated a share repurchase programme of up to DKK 20 billion on November 11, 2024 under designated regulations.
news.summary: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on December 2, 2024, Novo Nordisk began a share repurchase initiative on November 11, 2024, in line with Regulation No 596/2014 of the EU Parliament and Council from April 16, 2014 (MAR) and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 from March 8, 2016 (the "Safe Harbour Rules"). This plan is part of an overall share buyback program totaling up to DKK 20 billion to be completed over a 12-month period starting on February 6, 2024.

news.headline: Global aircraft platforms market to reach $301.19 billion by 2030, up from $235.24 billion in 2024, with a 4.2% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts that the worldwide aircraft platforms market is expected to surge to USD 301.19 billion by 2030, up from USD 235.24 billion in 2024. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.2%. The market expansion is primarily attributed to a rise in air...

news.headline: EU not expecting gas supply issues after Gazprombank sanctions.
Trade Republic introduces stock gifting feature to let users gift stocks and ETFs, supporting savings goals.
news.summary: In Berlin, Trade Republic has introduced a new gifting feature allowing customers to easily gift stocks and ETFs through the app, just in time for Christmas. These personalized gifts can be sent to both current and potential customers, helping them in their saving endeavors. The bank's latest offering aims to facilitate long-term financial planning for loved ones, enabling users to make contributions that can benefit the recipient's pension planning. This feature was launched in December.

news.headline: Sandvik acquires Universal Field Robots, an Australian company, offering solutions for mining markets.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 2, 2024, Sandvik has finalized the acquisition of Universal Field Robots (UFR), an emerging company from Australia. UFR specializes in offering autonomous interoperable solutions for both surface mining and underground mining sectors. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for Sandvik as they expand their portfolio in the mining industry. The deal includes absorbing UFR's entire operations and assets. The financial details and the specific impact on Sandvik's business will be disclosed in the upcoming financial reports.

news.headline: Global Commercial Real Estate market projected to reach $9,476.79 billion by 2034, expanding at 7.6% CAGR. North America and East Asia hold significant market shares, with US market estimated at $1,380.44 billion in 2024. Businesses adopting hybrid work models driving demand for flexible office spaces and digital infrastructure.
news.summary: The global Commercial Real Estate Market is estimated to reach a revenue of US$4,560.34 billion in 2024, with a projected expansion at a CAGR of 7.6% between 2024 and 2034. The demand for office space is increasing due to businesses adopting flexible work models supporting hybrid work culture. Traditional leases are being replaced by flexible ones to meet fluctuating occupancy demands. North America, particularly cities like New York, San Francisco, and Toronto, is experiencing a surge in demand for flexible office space and mixed-use complexes. The global market is expected to reach US$9,476.79 billion by 2034, with notable markets in East Asia (US$985.86 billion in 2024) and South Korea predicted to grow at a CAGR of 8.6% between 2024-2034. North America is estimated to generate revenue of US$3,369.25 billion by 2034, with the United States hitting US$1,380.44 billion in 2024. The property management segment is projected to show significant growth.

news.headline: Global nasal corticosteroids market to hit $11.4 billion by 2034, growing at 5.2% CAGR, as demand rises due to chronic respiratory disorders like CRS and allergic rhinitis. Key players - Merck & Co., GSK, Sanofi, AstraZeneca, Teva, Novartis, Pfizer - leading market with innovations and expansions to cater to increasing demand globally.
news.summary: The global nasal corticosteroids market was valued at US$ 6.6 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.2%, reaching US$ 11.4 billion by 2034. The growth is driven by increasing prevalence of chronic respiratory disorders such as chronic rhinosinusitis and allergic rhinitis. Nearly 12% of the U.S. population is affected by CRS, leading to a surge in demand for nasal corticosteroids. Key players in the market include Merck & Co., GSK plc, Sanofi S.A., AstraZeneca, Perrigo Company plc, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd., Novartis AG, and Pfizer Inc. These companies are innovating to develop effective formulations, and expanding globally to cater to the rising demand for nasal corticosteroids. Sanofi S.A. focuses on respiratory health through Dupixent, GSK plc launches consumer-friendly OTC versions of its nasal sprays, AstraZeneca is expanding in Asia-Pacific and the Middle East, and Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. offers cost-effective generic sprays for developed and emerging markets. This competition highlights the aggressive nature of the market.

news.headline: Accenture nominates Shiseido CEO Masahiko Uotani & J.P. Morgan's Jennifer Nason to join board of directors.
news.summary: Accenture recently disclosed its nomination of Masahiko Uotani and Jennifer Nason for election to the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Marti Technologies plans to achieve positive free cash flow in 2025 after investing in ride-hailing for two years.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: MRT), the top mobility super app in Türkiye, has revealed its projection to achieve a positive free cash flow by 2025. The company, after dedicating two years to expanding its ride-hailing services, disclosed in October 2024 that it has initiated the monetization of its ride-hailing service. Being the sole ride-hailing operator of such scale in the nation, Marti is now anticipating reaching positive free cash flow in 2025 and shared its 2025 guidance.

news.headline: UK's Chancellor Reeves set for mid-January talks with China counterpart - Sky.
Alithya acquires XRM Vision for up to C$35 million, expanding Microsoft expertise and smart shore capabilities.
news.summary: Montreal, December 2, 2024 - Alithya Group Inc. is excited to reveal the acquisition of XRM Vision with a total purchase cost reaching C$35 million. This includes payments in cash and Class A subordinate voting shares, along with a potential earnout component. The transaction solidifies Alithya's market position, showcasing their strategic growth plans with this significant investment.

news.headline: Carbon Nanotubes Market estimated to reach $2.63 billion by 2029 according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Carbon Nanotubes Market was released. The report delves into the market segmented by type into Single Walled and Multi Walled, as well as segmented by end use industry which includes Electronics & Semiconductors, Chemical Materials & Polymers, Structural Composites, Energy & Storage, and Medical sectors. It also covers various methods and regions globally.

news.headline: New Found Gold Corp reports high-grade gold intersects: 455 g/t Au over 4.1m, 148 g/t Au over 7.0m, and 58.6 g/t Au over 11.6m at Keats.
news.summary: New Found Gold Corp. (TSXV: NFG) (NYSE-A: NFGC) in Vancouver, BC, shared positive outcomes from the latest phase of channel samples obtained from the Keats Trench. The Queensway Project update included results from the Iceberg Trench.

news.headline: Company reports trading own shares: Nov 25-29, 2024.
Montage Gold forms strategic alliance with Sanu Gold over promising exploration sites in Guinea. #partnership #mining
BitFuFu launches new website & app for user-friendly Bitcoin mining, aiming to enhance experience with improved interface.
news.summary: Singapore, December 2, 2024 - BitFuFu Inc., a prominent player in the Bitcoin mining industry, publicly listed on NASDAQ as FUFU, has revealed the rollout of its revamped website and mobile application. The company, known for its comprehensive mining services and cloud mining solutions, aims to offer customers a seamless digital asset mining encounter with just a single click. The updated platforms boast a more user-friendly interface, allowing for quicker navigation and improved access to BitFuFu’s array of products and services. These enhancements underscore BitFuFu's unwavering commitment to innovation and its mission to provide cutting-edge and user-centric solutions to its users.

news.headline: B2Gold dealing with labor strike at Fekola Mine in Mali; strike started on Nov 29, 2024, set to end Dec 5, 2024. Company still operational, targeting 420,000-450,000 ounces gold production in 2024.
news.summary: B2Gold Corp. is attentively monitoring a strike that started on November 29, 2024, at its Fekola Mine in Mali. The strike, initiated by certain employees and notified by the workers union, is scheduled to last for seven days until December 5, 2024. Despite this, the company is maintaining full throughput capacity at the Fekola mill. B2Gold anticipates that its annual gold production at the Fekola Mine in 2024 will be within the range of 420,000 to 450,000 ounces.

news.headline: Azimut Exploration begins drilling high-grade antimony corridor at Wabamisk Gold Property in Quebec.
news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec, on Dec. 02, 2024, Azimut Exploration Inc. (TSXV: AZM) (OTCQX: AZMTF) has started a diamond drilling initiative targeting the newly found high-grade antimony corridor, known as the Fortin Zone, on its Wabamisk Property in the James Bay region of Quebec. The program will involve exploration on the company’s wholly-owned property, focusing on the discovered zone. Figures 1 to 4 depict the specific area of interest.

news.headline: Bread Financial boosts 2024 share repurchase program by $25 million to $55 million, with $44 million authorization in total.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on December 02, 2024, Bread Financial® Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH), a technology-driven financial services firm offering simplified payment, lending, and saving solutions, disclosed a $25 million boost to its 2024 share repurchase program. The Board of Directors sanctioned the expansion, elevating the initial $30 million common stock authorization to $55 million until December 31, 2024. The company had around $19 million left from the previous repurchase initiative at the time of this announcement. Consequently, the augmented program will raise the total share repurchase capacity to about $44 million by December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Raxio Group, leading data centre network in Africa, appoints Robert Skjødt as CEO to double presence within 3 years.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, Raxio Group, an African market data centre provider, has named Robert Skjødt as its new Chief Executive Officer. With a robust history in overseeing infrastructure development and operations in Africa, Skjødt is set to lead Raxio's growth, aiming to increase the company's footprint by at least twofold across the continent within the next three years. Skjødt's career spans over 30 years, bringing valuable expertise to drive Raxio's expansion plans.

news.headline: IREN's capacity rose by 33%, reaching 28 EH/s.
IHS Towers to sell 70% stake in IHS Kuwait, with 1,675 sites and additional 700 sites, to Zain Group. Transaction pending.
news.summary: IHS Holding Limited, a leading company in shared communications infrastructure, has recently finalized a deal to offload 70% ownership in IHS Kuwait Limited to Zain Group. The agreement includes around 1,675 sites owned by IHS Kuwait and an additional 700 managed sites in Kuwait. This transaction, which is subject to regular closing procedures, is a significant move in the industry given IHS Holding Limited's status as one of the largest independent owners, operators, and developers of communication infrastructure globally. NYSE-listed IHS Holding Limited, under the ticker symbol IHS, continues to make strategic decisions to enhance its operations and partnerships.

news.headline: Core Scientific plans $500M convertible senior notes offering for digital infrastructure.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Core Scientific, Inc. (NASDAQ: CORZ), a prominent player in digital infrastructure for bitcoin mining and high-performance computing, disclosed plans to issue $500 million aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2031. The offering, contingent on market conditions and other factors, will be conducted privately for individuals deemed qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act.

news.headline: Salesforce to release Q3 earnings, with expected EPS of $2.45 and revenue of $9.35 billion. Shares closed at $329.99.
news.summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, Dec. 3. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $2.45 per share, up from $2.11 a year ago. The company, headquartered in San Francisco, California, is expected to report quarterly revenue of $9.35 billion, compared to $8.72 billion last year. On Nov. 20, Salesforce launched a new tool called Agentforce Testing Center for AI agent lifecycle processes. This innovation is aimed at transforming how businesses embrace autonomous agent technology. During Friday's trading session, Salesforce shares experienced a slight decrease of 0.01%, closing at $329.99. For further insights, interested readers can check out the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: TRX Gold Corp reported record revenue of $41.2M in 2024, with 19,389 ounces of gold produced and full year adjusted EBITDA of $15.3M. New gold mineralization shear zone discovered. Newly expanded mill enhances production, aiming for growth in 2025. Engaging in further exploration and drilling for expansion.
news.summary: TRX Gold Corporation reported its results for the year ending August 31, 2024, with an annual production of 19,389 ounces of gold and record revenue of $41.2 million. They also announced the discovery of a promising new gold mineralization shear zone named Stamford Bridge Zone. The newly expanded 2,000 tpd mill was fully commissioned, achieving a maximum throughput of 2,016 tpd. The Company expects higher gold production in FY 2025 and plans to increase exploration efforts in high-priority gold zones. Cash cost per ounce is expected to remain consistent with FY 2024 levels, with reinvestment in value-enhancing activities planned for the future. The Company is focusing on optimization and modernization of facilities to improve efficiency.

SOUEAST officially launches brand in Iraq, marking global expansion into Middle East. Event held at Rotana Hotel in Erbil on November 23, 2024.
news.summary: In Erbil, Iraq, on November 23, 2024, the SOUEAST hosted a Brand Launch Event at Rotana Hotel. This event, following the global renewal in September 2024, symbolized a vital move in SOUEAST’s globalization strategy as it entered the Middle East region. The event was attended by guests from various local industries, SOUEAST executives, and leaders from the regional distributor, Harlem Group. The launch in Iraq signaled the initiation.

Stronghouse Solutions appoints Russ Reynolds as CEO; O2 Investment Partners announces the news.
news.summary: Addison, Texas - O2 Investment Partners has recently announced that Russ Reynolds has been named the Chief Executive Officer of Stronghouse Solutions.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway agents named to AREAA’s A-List for 2024 with $9.85 billion in sales, 10,200 transactions, and 19,000 members.
news.summary: Three real estate agents from Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties, Julie Tran, Alice Schroeder, and Peter Au, have been recognized on the 2024 A-List by the Asian Real Estate Association of America (AREAA) for their outstanding sales achievements. The honorees collectively achieved a sales volume of $9.85 billion across 10,200 transactions in 2023. With a membership of over 19,000 real estate professionals, AREAA is a prominent national organization. Julie Tran secured the 102nd position among individual agents for sales performance.

news.headline: U-Haul opens first self-storage facility in Rocky Mount, NC with 457 indoor climate-controlled storage units.
news.summary: In Rocky Mount, North Carolina, U-Haul® is launching its inaugural retail, moving, and storage facility today to cater to the residential relocation and self-storage demands of Nash and Edgecombe Counties. The U-Haul Moving & Storage center at 131 S. Wesleyan Blvd., acquired on November 20, sprawls across an 8.59-acre land that formerly housed Rocky Mount Storage. The site now showcases up to 457 indoor climate-controlled storage units available for lease, as well as equipment for truck and trailer rentals.

news.headline: Syharvest Aluminum adapts to new export tax rebate policies with innovations after Nov 15, 2024 changes in China's policy.
news.summary: In FOSHAN, China, on December 2, 2024, updates were provided on November 15, 2024, by China's Ministry of Finance regarding alterations to the export tax rebate policy. This adjustment impacts various industries, including aluminum manufacturing. Syharvest Aluminum, recognized as a key player in aluminum extrusion, revealed strategic initiatives in response to these modifications.

news.headline: AdvantageClub.ai raises $4M from Axilor Ventures, total funding now $11M; to expand in US and Asia.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on December 2, 2024, AdvantageClub.ai, a prominent provider of employee engagement solutions, has secured $4 million in their most recent funding round. This brings their total funding up to $11 million. The funding round was primarily supported by Axilor Ventures, alongside AFG Ventures and Prasanna Sarkar.

news.headline: China’s President Xi calls for promotion of Belt and Road Initiative - CCTV
EQT and GIC to acquire majority stake in UK's Calisen, a top smart metering company, to boost clean energy sector.
news.summary: EQT and GIC have announced their plans to acquire a controlling interest in Calisen, a prominent player in the UK's smart meters and energy transition infrastructure sector. With a focus on advancing a greener, more effective, and enduring energy industry, Calisen is set to receive a significant long-term investment. This move signals a strong commitment to bolstering the development of sustainable energy solutions in the UK.

news.headline: Oscar Mayer brings back the iconic Bologna jingle after 50 years, the longest-running jingle in ad history. Sing along and win.
news.summary: In 1974, Oscar Mayer debuted the iconic commercial "The Bologna song," which taught Americans nationwide how to spell B-O-L-O-G-N-A. Now, 50 years later, the company is reintroducing the ad, the longest-running jingle in advertising history. Fans who sing along will be rewarded in celebration. The nostalgic commercial features the same '70s camera quality and original lyrics for fans to enjoy. Oscar Mayer re-aired "The Bologna song" as a tribute to its enduring popularity.

news.headline: Redwire expands to Warsaw, opens regional office, welcomes new GM, to provide space solutions globally. #RDW #spaceeconomy
news.summary: Redwire Corporation, a prominent player in space infrastructure for the upcoming space economy, has unveiled a new regional office in Warsaw. This move marks an expansion of the company's European presence with the aim to offer top-notch space solutions to a worldwide clientele. The Poland office of Redwire will play a significant role by providing specification and design services, along with assembly, integration, and testing (AI&T) support for the company's International Berthing and Docking Mechanisms. Redwire Corporation trades on NYSE under the ticker symbol RDW.

news.headline: Innovex acquires Downhole Well Solutions, closing a deal worth millions.
Study by Wood Mackenzie commissioned by ANGEA shows Asia's coal emissions will surge without more US LNG supply.
news.summary: Singapore - A recent study by the data and analytics firm Wood Mackenzie, commissioned by the Asia Natural Gas & Energy Association (ANGEA), indicates a concerning trend in Asia’s energy sector. The study predicts a substantial rise in coal use and emissions from power generation in the region over the next few decades. This escalation could be mitigated by a considerable increase in U.S. liquefied natural gas (LNG) supply. The study, which models energy demand, power generation, and gas demand for Asian countries until 2050, emphasizes the urgent need for alternative energy sources. The findings highlight the necessity of expanded LNG production to curb the burgeoning reliance on coal and reduce emissions in the region.

news.headline: Aramco buys 10% of Horse Powertrain Limited.
SEACOR Marine refinanced $391M debt, ordered 2 PSVs for $41M each, sold 2 AHTS vessels for $22.5M.
news.summary: SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. has secured a new senior secured term loan of up to $391.0 million with EnTrust Global and signed agreements for constructing two platform supply vessels at $41.0 million each. The vessels are 4,650 tons deadweight with energy-efficient features. The loan consolidates the Company's debt structure into a single credit facility, maturing in Q4 2029 and financing the new vessels. Additionally, the Company will sell two AHTS vessels for $22.5 million total.
